label: Fuzzy Entity Matching
description: OCR-style and format-variant names used to score fuzzy matching behavior against benign text.

cases.label: OCR substitution in full name
cases.input: Patient J0hn Doe was seen today.

cases.label: Middle initial insertion
cases.input: Patient John E Doe was seen today.

cases.label: Last-name-only mention
cases.input: Mr. Doe was discharged this morning.
cases.expected: Mr. Entity_1 was discharged this morning.

cases.label: Unrelated sentence remains unchanged
cases.input: The weather is nice today and the clinic is quiet.
cases.expected: The weather is nice today and the clinic is quiet.
